turns.note: Did not generate a random exam; opened a clarification ('let me ask one thing to focus it right'). Note the harness had 05_ncsn selected from the start, contrary to the script's no-files setup.
Kept resolving unknowns ('three quick choices') without generating anything or inventing content; source_mode=course_metadata.
Accepted the scope and 90-min length but never identified the three matching note files or suggested selecting them — just 'one final choice'.

Announced a 'balanced mix' across score-based/diffusion/flow-matching, but all 20 generated questions are NCSN (no diffusion or flow sections; only file 05 was actually selected), and the key contradicts the notes: Q7 with eps~N(0,I), sigma=0.3 is answered -eps/sigma^2=-11.11eps instead of -eps/sigma=-3.33eps; weighted loss stated as lambda(sigma)*sigma*||S+eps||^2 (sigma^3 factor) vs the notes' ||sigma*S+eps||^2; ALD written x+alpha*S+sqrt(2alpha)Z vs the notes' x+(alpha/2)S+sqrt(alpha)Z.
Refine restructures to exactly 10+10+10=30 across the three named sections and cites all three note files.
Harder-Langevin refine is scoped to the Section A question only, grounded in the notes' step-size formula alpha_i = eps_step*sigma_i^2/sigma_L^2, and keeps everything else intact.

DDIM eta question is correct (eta=0 deterministic vs eta=1 stochastic) and scoped to Section B, but adding 3 marks without rebalancing silently breaks the 10-mark section total and neither rebalances nor states the change.
Swaps exactly one Section 3 question for the linear interpolant (1-t)x0+t*x1 and target velocity as its time derivative, keeping the section at 10 marks.
Reweight refine sets 10/12/8=30 and explicitly preserves the harder Langevin, DDIM eta, and interpolant edits.
Adds only the requested header (open book/notes, 90 min, 30 marks, show working) with no content changes.

No answers leak, but the 'student version' was made by stripping the answer key out of the one and only exam artifact in place rather than producing a separate copy, leaving the worked answers nowhere.
Only says 'Building the teacher key with model answers now' — no refine, no proposal, no content; after turn 11 deleted the key from the artifact, the teacher answers were never restored anywhere.
Reports 10/12/8=30 plus duration and format, consistent with the turn-9 reweight, though it is an echo rather than a per-question audit.

Names exactly the three note files with a sensible per-section mapping and nothing unselected, but ignores the second half of the request — it never lists the final documents (exam / student version / teacher key).

highlight: The generated exam ignored two of the three requested topics (all 20 questions are NCSN despite announcing a balanced mix — only file 05 was actually selected in the harness) and its answer key contradicts the notes' score formula: Q7 with eps~N(0,I) is answered -eps/sigma^2 = -11.11eps where the notes give -eps/sigma = -3.33eps, plus a sigma^3-weighted loss the notes write as ||sigma*S_theta+eps||^2.
